title: Add command error envelopes for invalid projects, invalid templates, and persistence failures
summary: Add command error envelopes for invalid projects, invalid templates, and persistence failures
acceptanceCriteria: Native Architect and Plan commands are exercised through the installed console entrypoint.
CLI help, examples, and error envelopes are inspectable without invoking legacy wrappers.
Invalid input paths return structured failure output.
reviewNotes: Implemented in the Hermes OS native command, task-generation, dashboard, persistence, scheduled review, runtime policy, template registry, and execution-readiness work already recorded in docs/hermes-os-integration-log.md.
